response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have one brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of recent or deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platforms required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Experience with event-driven systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ work in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) and IEC 62443 security standards
No demonstrated experience with cloud platforms (Azure) or scalable on-premises industrial systems
